units.source_text: of scheme liabilities at the balance sheet date for each plan. Surpluses are only recognised to the extent that they are recoverable through reduced

units.source_text: The latest funding valuation of the plan at 31 December 2022 was carried out by Towers Watson Limited, using the projected unit credit method.
units.translation_target_text: 该计划截至 2022 年 12 月 31 日的最新融资估值由 Towers Watson Limited 采用预计单位信用法进行。
